title: Assistant Store Manager - Poojara Telecom - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Poojara Telecom - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Poojara Telecom in Jodhpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Poojara Telecom:
Poojara Telecom is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poojara Telecom!
